title: Minna No Eva Fan Retrospective Evangelion 30
display_title: Minna No Eva Fan Retrospective Evangelion 30
wikitext:
[]: Minna No Eva Fan Retrospective: Evangelion 3.0             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sat Nov 16, 2013 2:10 pm A nice retrospective post on Eva 3.0: http://neweva.blog103.fc2.com/blog-entry-2654.html This could be a good timeframe to keep in mind regarding news on Final, though I hope 3.0 and Final will only have about a year in between pause like 1.0 and 2.0 did! Speaking of 3.0, since it's 11/17 in Japan, Nico Nico will broadcast the 3.33 BD version tonight (starting from the Giant God Warrior short). It'll start at 9:00 PM (21:00), but it'll probably be closer to 9:30 PM (21:30): http://neweva.blog103.fc2.com/blog-entry-2666.html

[]:             Quote Post by TheFriskyIan » Sat Nov 16, 2013 2:13 pm Um, when it airs at 9:00 pm, that's Japanese time right? So when would that air EST?

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sat Nov 16, 2013 2:14 pm TheFriskyIan wrote: Um, when it airs at 9:00 pm, that's Japanese time right? So when would that air EST?

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sat Nov 16, 2013 2:14 pm http://www.timeanddate.com/worldclock/converter.html

[]:             Quote Post by TheFriskyIan » Sat Nov 16, 2013 2:19 pm Whoops, sorry and thank you. People in the other thread were hoping for an updated preview of FINAL. I doubt that will happen since in the blog it's stated that they streaming it with the DVD version.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sat Nov 16, 2013 2:25 pm Yeah, the only time we got an updated preview is when 1.01 and 2.22 aired the "TV versions" on NTV Friday Roadshow: http://forum.evageeks.org/post/671791/Evangelion-10-TV-Version-Revised-20-Preview/#671791

[]:             Quote Post by LightDragonman » Sat Nov 16, 2013 3:02 pm Your're probably right. Still, there could be an announcement of some sort at the end.

[]:             Quote Post by Giji Shinka » Sun Nov 17, 2013 7:03 am It's now airing. Also, dat cruel angel thesis NME version- opening they made! Holy shit.

[]:             Quote Post by DemonSpade » Sun Nov 17, 2013 9:45 am Giji Shinka wrote: It's now airing. Also, dat cruel angel thesis NME version- opening they made! Holy shit.

[]:             Quote Post by Shinoyami65 » Sun Nov 17, 2013 10:09 am Giji Shinka wrote: Also, dat cruel angel thesis NME version- opening they made! Holy shit.

[]:             Quote Post by Giji Shinka » Sun Nov 17, 2013 11:13 am It's not uploaded in Youtube, unfortunalety. The opening was basically NGE opening, but it had 3.0 scenes, mostly. The final scene of the opening was the most interesting one. (The part where Kaworu is in a black room that has this weird red symbol on the ground. This scene was from 3.0 "fake" preview) Now to the interesting part: Those four symbols looked different when comparing them to preview version. Plus, in the room there weren't four shadows nor Kaworu.

[]:             Quote Post by Shinoyami65 » Sun Nov 17, 2013 11:26 am ^Possibly indicating that some of the stuff that was shown in the preview happened, but happened differently from what was shown?

[]:             Quote Post by Giji Shinka » Sun Nov 17, 2013 11:35 am Also, the way that scene was presented (The camera angle) was different. I wasn't able to see all scenes closely because it went too fast, but there was definitely some new stuff.

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Sun Nov 17, 2013 11:38 am Honestly this new openeing sounds fan-made. The "new" scene also would be completely worthless without Kaworu or the 4 shadows in it (who the storyboards claim are Teh Reis anyway).

[]:             Quote Post by Giji Shinka » Sun Nov 17, 2013 11:40 am Yeah. It's possible that the scene (And opening) was modified/made by fan. Who knows.

[]:             Quote Post by Shinoyami65 » Sun Nov 17, 2013 12:32 pm I'd question how they would go about modifying it in the first place, but who knows? How "official" is the livestream anyway, is it just a fan thing or does Anno/Khara have a hand in there somewhere?

[]:             Quote Post by Giji Shinka » Sun Nov 17, 2013 1:22 pm Shinoyami65 wrote: How "official" is the livestream anyway, is it just a fan thing or does Anno/Khara have a hand in there somewhere?

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sun Nov 17, 2013 6:06 pm Nico Nico are the ones who streamed it (starting from the God Warrior short), but Nico Nico also has lots of fanmade content on the site. If it was something before the God Warrior short, it was probably some fanmade thing. Might be up on Nico if somebody could hunt it down? So there was no new content for 3.33 (updated preview?) like some theorized?

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Sun Nov 17, 2013 6:19 pm It doesn't look like it, otherwise the internet would be exploding right about now.
